presets.name: Qwen 2.5 7B
presets.description: Solid all-around model. Good balance of speed and accuracy for voice commands.

presets.name: Qwen 2.5 14B
presets.description: Stronger reasoning with more parameters. Needs ~10GB RAM for Q4 quantization.

presets.name: Qwen 3 8B
presets.description: Latest Qwen generation, 8B dense model with thinking disabled for speed.

presets.name: Qwen 3 14B
presets.description: Qwen 3 dense 14B. Strong tool calling and instruction following.

presets.name: Qwen 3 30B MoE
presets.description: Mixture-of-experts: 30B total, 3.3B active. Fast inference with large model quality.

presets.name: Llama 3.1 8B
presets.description: Meta's Llama 3.1 8B instruct. Well-tested, wide community support.

presets.name: Gemma 2 9B
presets.description: Google Gemma 2 9B. Strong general reasoning with efficient architecture.

presets.name: Gemma 3 12B
presets.description: Google Gemma 3 with improved instruction following over Gemma 2.

presets.name: Gemma 4 27B
presets.description: Google Gemma 4 with native tool calling. Uses custom chat format with thinking disabled.
